---
title: "Guides"
subtitle: "Practical recipes and deeper dives for PyFixest practitioners."
aliases:
  - /explanation/index.html
listing:
  type: grid
  contents:
    - marginaleffects.qmd
    - regression_decomposition.qmd
    - demeaner-backends.qmd
    - pyfixest_gpu.qmd
    - ../pyfixest-gpu-cupy.ipynb
    - stata-2-pyfixest.qmd
    - panel_variance_reduction.qmd
    # - surrogate-indices-experimental-selection.qmd
  sort: false
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 2
  grid-item-border: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

Task-oriented guides that show you how to accomplish specific goals with PyFixest.
